# pi-voice

> Hold-to-talk voice input for the Pi coding agent CLI.

## Overview

pi-voice is a Pi extension that adds streaming voice-to-text input to the Pi coding agent. Hold SPACE to record, release to transcribe — text appears in the editor in real time via Deepgram Nova 3 WebSocket streaming.

## Core Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/codexstar69/pi-listen/blob/main/README.md): Installation, usage, architecture
- [Troubleshooting](https://github.com/codexstar69/pi-listen/blob/main/docs/troubleshooting.md): Common issues and solutions
- [Contributing](https://github.com/codexstar69/pi-listen/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): Development setup and guidelines
- [Security](https://github.com/codexstar69/pi-listen/blob/main/SECURITY.md): Security policy
- [Changelog](https://github.com/codexstar69/pi-listen/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): Release history
- [License](https://github.com/codexstar69/pi-listen/blob/main/LICENSE): MIT

## Key Components

- `extensions/voice.ts`: Main extension — hold-to-talk state machine, Deepgram streaming, voice commands, UI widgets, double-escape editor clear
- `extensions/voice/config.ts`: Configuration loading, saving, migration, onboarding state
- `extensions/voice/onboarding.ts`: Interactive first-run setup wizard (Deepgram API key)

## Features

- Hold-to-talk voice input (SPACE hold or Ctrl+Shift+V toggle)
- Deepgram Nova 3 streaming STT with live interim transcripts
- Voice commands: "hey pi, run tests", "undo", "submit", "new line", etc.
- Continuous dictation mode (/voice dictate)
- Double-escape clears editor text (cross-platform)
- Kitty protocol support + non-Kitty gap-based fallback
- Cross-platform: macOS, Windows, Linux

## Commands

- `/voice [on|off|stop|dictate|history|test|info|setup]`

## Keybindings

- `SPACE` (hold ≥800ms) — Record to editor
- `Ctrl+Shift+V` — Toggle recording
- `Escape` × 2 — Clear editor text

## Installation

```
pi install npm:@codexstar/pi-voice
```
